title: Improve X.com content fetching reliability
problem: The `get_page_content()` tool consistently returns empty responses when attempting to retrieve content from X.com, preventing deep dives, curiosity searches, and general feed analysis.
proposed_solution: Investigate and fix the `get_page_content()` tool's interaction with X.com to ensure reliable content retrieval. This may involve updating the scraping mechanism, handling dynamic content, or addressing anti-bot measures.
